projectDescription: A beginner-friendly fitness planning web app offering workout routines, a weekly schedule planner, nutrition guidance, and interactive tools like a BMI calculator and water intake tracker.
keyFeatures: Workout library with filtering by goal, level, and keyword
Random workout generator for quick session ideas
BMI calculator with health category feedback
Daily water intake calculator based on weight and activity level
Randomized meal idea generator (protein, carb, vegetables, fat)
Newsletter signup for personalized workout plans
Product review form with animated confirmation and review counter
publicApiSurface: BMI Calculator — calculateBMI(height, weight) → { value, category, message, color }
Water Intake Calculator — calculateDailyWater(weightKg, activityMultiplier) → liters
Workout Filter — filter by goal (weight-loss, strength, mobility, endurance), level (beginner, easy, intermediate), and keyword search
Weekly Plan — add/remove/clear sessions stored in localStorage (key: fitstart_weekly_plan)
Random Workout Generator — picks a random entry from the workouts array
Meal Idea Generator — random protein, carb, vegetable, and healthy fat combination
Product Review Form — submits via GET to review.html with params: productName, rating, installDate, features, writtenReview, userName
Review Counter — persisted in localStorage (key: reviewCount), animated on load
